message:
fix(btree): generalize stale error message in read_cell_pointer_inline

The error message referenced `count_all_rows` (the only caller at the
time of writing), but the helper is now also reached from the inline
fallback path in parse_cell_at after the cfd468c8 hybrid-read fix.
Include the page number + offset + page length in the error detail
instead, which is useful wherever this helper is called from.

Pure diagnostic-message improvement; no behavior change. Btree test
suite: 362 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
